```{r}
suppressPackageStartupMessages({
  library(edgeR)
  library(dplyr)
  library(ComplexHeatmap)
  library(circlize)
  library(grid)
})

dat  <- readRDS("/Users/temket/Desktop/LPS/LPS_cts_meta.rds")
cts  <- dat$cts
meta <- dat$meta_data

# DAM genes 
dam_genes <- c(
  "Ctsb","Ctsd","Apoe","B2m","Fth1","Lyz2",
  "Trem2","Tyrobp","Cst7","Ctsl","Lpl","Cd9","Csf1","Itgax",
  "Clec7a","Timp2","Spp1","Gpnmb","Fabp5","Lgals3","Cd63","Cd68",
  "Axl","Msr1",
  "P2ry12","Sall1","Tmem119","Siglech","Cx3cr1"
)

#  IRM genes

irm_genes <- c(
  "Ifit1","Ifit2","Ifit3","Ifitm3","Isg15","Mx1",
  "Oas1a","Oas1b","Oas1c","Oas1g","Oas2","Oas3","Oasl1","Oasl2",
  "Stat1","Stat2","Irf7","Irf9",
  "Cxcl10","Ccl12",
  "Siglech","Tmem119","P2ry12","Cx3cr1","Sall1"
)
```


```{r}
combined_genes <- unique(c(irm_genes, dam_genes))

sym_map <- bind_rows(
  read.csv("/Users/temket/Desktop/LPS/Final_scripts/mod3/Region/Brain.effect.csv"),
  read.csv("/Users/temket/Desktop/LPS/Final_scripts/mod3/Region/ONH.effect.csv"),
  read.csv("/Users/temket/Desktop/LPS/Final_scripts/mod3/Region/Retina.effect.csv")
) %>%
  select(ensembl_gene_id, symbol) %>%
  distinct() %>%
  filter(!is.na(symbol), nzchar(symbol))

make_lcpm_sym <- function(tissue_name) {
  samp_ids <- rownames(meta)[meta$tissue == tissue_name]
  cts_sub  <- cts[, samp_ids]

  dge  <- DGEList(counts = cts_sub)
  dge  <- calcNormFactors(dge, method = "TMM")
  lcpm <- cpm(dge, log = TRUE, prior.count = 1)

  lcpm_df <- as.data.frame(lcpm) %>%
    mutate(ensembl_gene_id = rownames(lcpm)) %>%
    left_join(sym_map, by = "ensembl_gene_id") %>%
    filter(!is.na(symbol)) %>%
    mutate(row_mean = rowMeans(across(where(is.numeric)))) %>%
    group_by(symbol) %>%
    slice_max(row_mean, n = 1, with_ties = FALSE) %>%
    ungroup()

  mat <- as.matrix(select(lcpm_df, -ensembl_gene_id, -symbol, -row_mean))
  rownames(mat) <- lcpm_df$symbol
  mat
}

lcpm_brain  <- make_lcpm_sym("brain")
lcpm_onh    <- make_lcpm_sym("ONH")
lcpm_retina <- make_lcpm_sym("retina")

# ── Column ordering: Brain | ONH | Retina, within each: B6/CAST/WSB/NZO x PBS->LPS ──
strain_lookup <- c(B6 = "C57BL/6J", CAST = "CAST/EiJ", WSB = "WSB/EiJ", NZO = "NZO/HILtJ")
strain_order  <- c("B6", "CAST", "WSB", "NZO")
trt_order     <- c("PBS", "LPS")

get_col_order <- function(tissue_name) {
  samp_ids <- rownames(meta)[meta$tissue == tissue_name]
  m <- meta[samp_ids, ]

  ordered_cols <- c()
  for (s in strain_order) {
    for (t in trt_order) {
      cols <- rownames(m)[m$Strain == strain_lookup[s] & m$treatment == t]
      ordered_cols <- c(ordered_cols, cols)
    }
  }
  ordered_cols
}

col_brain  <- get_col_order("brain")
col_onh    <- get_col_order("ONH")
col_retina <- get_col_order("retina")

# ── Row z-score per tissue, then cbind across tissues ─────────────────────────
make_zscore_tissue <- function(lcpm_mat, col_order, gene_list) {
  mat  <- lcpm_mat[gene_list, col_order, drop = FALSE]
  zmat <- t(scale(t(mat)))
  zmat[apply(zmat, 1, function(x) any(is.nan(x))), ] <- 0
  zmat
}

make_combined_zscore <- function(gene_list) {
  present_all <- Reduce(
    intersect,
    list(rownames(lcpm_brain), rownames(lcpm_onh), rownames(lcpm_retina))
  )

  keep <- gene_list[gene_list %in% present_all]
  missing <- setdiff(gene_list, keep)

  if (length(missing) > 0) {
    message("Genes not found in all tissues and excluded: ", paste(missing, collapse = ", "))
  }

  z_brain  <- make_zscore_tissue(lcpm_brain,  col_brain,  keep)
  z_onh    <- make_zscore_tissue(lcpm_onh,    col_onh,    keep)
  z_retina <- make_zscore_tissue(lcpm_retina, col_retina, keep)

  cbind(z_brain, z_onh, z_retina)
}

combined_mat <- make_combined_zscore(combined_genes)

# ── Shared aesthetics ─────────────────────────────────────────────────────────
col_fun <- colorRamp2(c(-2, 0, 2), c("#3B4CC0", "white", "#F7A11A"))

strain_cols    <- c(B6 = "#888888", CAST = "#E69F00", WSB = "#56B4E9", NZO = "#009E73")
treatment_cols <- c(PBS = "#BDBDBD", LPS = "#D55E00")
region_cols    <- c(Brain = "#7B2D8B", ONH = "#1B7837", Retina = "#C0392B")

all_cols <- c(col_brain, col_onh, col_retina)

region_vec <- c(
  rep("Brain",  length(col_brain)),
  rep("ONH",    length(col_onh)),
  rep("Retina", length(col_retina))
)

strain_vec <- sapply(all_cols, function(s) {
  full <- meta[s, "Strain"]
  names(strain_lookup)[strain_lookup == full]
})

trt_vec <- meta[all_cols, "treatment"]

col_ann <- HeatmapAnnotation(
  Region    = factor(region_vec, levels = c("Brain","ONH","Retina")),
  Strain    = factor(strain_vec, levels = strain_order),
  Treatment = factor(trt_vec,    levels = trt_order),
  col = list(
    Region    = region_cols,
    Strain    = strain_cols,
    Treatment = treatment_cols
  ),
  annotation_name_side = "left",
  annotation_name_gp   = gpar(fontsize = 10, fontface = "bold"),
  simple_anno_size     = unit(4, "mm"),
  show_legend          = TRUE,
  annotation_legend_param = list(
    Region    = list(title = "Region",    title_gp = gpar(fontsize = 10, fontface = "bold"), labels_gp = gpar(fontsize = 9)),
    Strain    = list(title = "Strain",    title_gp = gpar(fontsize = 10, fontface = "bold"), labels_gp = gpar(fontsize = 9)),
    Treatment = list(title = "Treatment", title_gp = gpar(fontsize = 10, fontface = "bold"), labels_gp = gpar(fontsize = 9))
  )
)

col_split <- factor(region_vec, levels = c("Brain","ONH","Retina"))

gene_class <- ifelse(
  rownames(combined_mat) %in% irm_genes & rownames(combined_mat) %in% dam_genes,
  "Homeostatic",
  ifelse(rownames(combined_mat) %in% irm_genes, "IRM", "DAM")
)

row_ann <- rowAnnotation(
  Signature = factor(gene_class, levels = c("IRM", "DAM", "Homeostatic")),
  col = list(
    Signature = c(
      IRM = "#4575B4",
      DAM = "#D73027",
      Homeostatic = "#7B3294"
    )
  ),
  annotation_name_gp = gpar(fontsize = 10, fontface = "bold"),
  simple_anno_size = unit(4, "mm")
)

combined_ht <- Heatmap(
  combined_mat[, all_cols],
  name  = "Z-score",
  col   = col_fun,
  top_annotation  = col_ann,
  left_annotation = row_ann,

  cluster_rows             = TRUE,
  clustering_method_rows   = "ward.D2",
  clustering_distance_rows = "euclidean",
  show_row_dend            = TRUE,
  row_dend_width           = unit(8, "mm"),

  cluster_columns   = FALSE,
  column_order      = all_cols,
  column_split      = col_split,
  column_gap        = unit(3, "mm"),
  show_column_names = FALSE,

  row_names_side = "right",
  row_names_gp   = gpar(fontsize = 9),

  rect_gp = gpar(col = "white", lwd = 0.4),
  border  = TRUE,

  column_title      = c("Brain", "ONH", "Retina"),
  column_title_gp   = gpar(fontsize = 13, fontface = "bold"),
  column_title_side = "top",

  heatmap_legend_param = list(
    title         = "Z-score",
    title_gp      = gpar(fontsize = 10, fontface = "bold"),
    labels_gp     = gpar(fontsize = 9),
    legend_height = unit(35, "mm"),
    at            = c(-2, -1, 0, 1, 2),
    direction     = "vertical"
  )
)

png("/Users/temket/Desktop/LPS/Final_scripts/mod3/DAM_IRM_combined_heatmap.png", width = 18, height = 12, units = "in", res = 300, bg = "white")
draw(
  combined_ht,
  padding                = unit(c(15, 60, 15, 15), "mm"),
  heatmap_legend_side    = "right",
  annotation_legend_side = "right",
  merge_legend           = FALSE
)
dev.off()
```
